Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_T_001
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13201 202 0}Oh? Is there something I can assist you with?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_T_002
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Did you need anything else?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_T_003
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Thank you for earlier. Now then... How may I be of assistance?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_EXIT
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13204 202 0}If you require anything else, please do not hesitate to ask.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_NPC_ELIZ_DATE_START
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13202 202 0}I've been waiting for you to ask. Shall we be on our way?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_NPC_ELIZ_DATE_NG_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13220 202 0}I'm terribly sorry, but... I would much rather you extend an invitation during the day.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_NPC_ELIZ_DATE_NG_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13220 202 0}I'm terribly sorry... but I'm afraid it will have to wait for another day.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_NPC_ELIZ_DATE_NG_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}She turned down my invitation...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should just focus on[n]other requests for now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_NPC_ELIZ_DATE_NG_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13218 202 0}I'm taking our next destination into great consideration. Please wait awhile until I've made up my mind.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_NPC_ELIZ_DATE_NG_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Elizabeth is figuring out where to go next...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe if I fulfill more of her requests,[n]I'll be able to invite her out...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_NPC_ELIZ_DATE_NG_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13216 202 0}From what I've gathered, I believe your school is having a "holiday," correct?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}I wish to experience the average student's daily routine... Could you invite me on a regular school day?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_NPC_ELIZ_DATE_NG_ALL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 3 -1 -1 0 0}It is my utmost priority to fulfill my duty.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_DATE_OPEN_1_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13201 202 0}A moment if you will? There is something I must inform you of.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Whenever you complete one of my many requests, I become ever curiouser about this world...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}And now an urge to investigate this place for myself has arisen within me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Therefore, I would like to request that you escort me to various locations.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}First, I would like you to guide me through the Paulownia Mall here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13230 202 0}If you have the time, then please come fetch me so long as the sun is out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_DATE_OPEN_1_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Regarding my request to have you escort me to various locations in this world...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}I would like you to show me around this Paulownia Mall first.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13230 202 0}If you have the time, then please come fetch me so long as the sun is out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_DATE_OPEN_1_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13201 202 0}A moment if you will? There is something I must inform you of.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Thus far, you have completed a number of my requests...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}And, just as I had thought, this world truly is interesting... So much so that an urge to investigate it myself has risen within me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Therefore, I would like to request that you escort me to various locations.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13231 202 0}Please come to Paulownia Mall at a later date. I will give you more details then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_DATE_OPEN_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}I humbly request that you escort me somewhere once again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}This time, I would like to investigate a certain area known as Iwatodai.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13231 202 0}If you have the time, then please come fetch me so long as the sun is out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_DATE_OPEN_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Do you mind... escorting me yet again?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}This time, I would like to go to a location known as Naganaki Shrine.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13231 202 0}If you have the time, then please come fetch me so long as the sun is out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_DATE_OPEN_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}I apologize if this is becoming repetitive, but... I'd like to ask you to escort me once more.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}This time, could you take me to this Gekkoukan High School you attend?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13231 202 0}If you have the time after school, please come by and let me know.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_DATE_OPEN_5
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 3 -1 -1 0 0}There is yet another location I would like to visit...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 3 -1 -1 0 0}Would it be all right if, um... well, if you could invite me to your room?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GIFT_RAREMEDAL_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13222 202 0}It's as if your presence emanates a far brighter radiance than before. Perhaps all your hard work is starting to show.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Here. It may not be much, but this is my gift to you. Please accept it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GIFT_RAREMEDAL_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13222 202 0}I can sense that the power growing within you stems from the bonds you have forged and nurtured.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Here. It may not be much, but this is my gift to you. Please accept it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GIFT_RAREMEDAL_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13222 202 0}I can see that you are living quite the fulfilling life, between nurturing your bonds and striving for self-improvement.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}This is less of a reward and more of a gift from me to you. Please, take it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GIFT_RAREMEDAL_04
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13230 202 0}I still cannot foresee the limits of your potential... I look forward to witnessing you grow even further.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MISSING_INFO_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}There seems to be a human presence within Tartarus between floors {f 2 4 0} and {f 2 4 1}.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}It would be best for you to search the tower and locate them as soon as possible.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MISSING_INFO_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13212 202 0}I see that you have rescued those who were trapped inside Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}You may now rest easy... I no longer sense anyone within that tower.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MISSING_INFO_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13216 202 0}...It seems a little guest was feline curious and mew-andered their way to floor {f 2 4 2}.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Do keep that in mind as you explore.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MISSING_INFO_04
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13215 202 0}I don't sense any lost persons within Tartarus at this moment...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}However... it appears a little guest was feline curious enough to mew-ander inside.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}They should be somewhere around floor {f 2 4 2}. Perhaps you should go find them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_INFO_LAST_DAY_HEAL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13202 202 0}At long last... you will soon arrive at the top of this tower to overcome its challenges.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}I will do everything in my power to assist you up to the very end so that you may grasp victory.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Please come see me if you feel your strength waning. I shall heal you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_LAST_DAY_HEAL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Everyone's HP and SP recovered![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_TALK_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13208 202 0}I see you are here to challenge Tartarus. Make sure you prepare appropriately...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Should you have any business related to Personas, please visit the Velvet Room.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_TALK_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13208 202 0}If you have any business related to Personas, please visit the Velvet Room.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}However, you may speak with me about my personal requests here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_TALK_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13216 202 0}I will add new requests periodically. You can expect new ones about once a month.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Some, however, may only become available upon completion of other requests.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Also, do pay attention to the "number" of the request.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13232 202 0}If there is a number missing, then there may be a request that is still hidden.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_TALK_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13218 202 0}As my master has said, deepening your bonds will bolster the strength of your Personas.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}I hope you enjoy a fulfilling life, one where you forge many meaningful relationships.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_TALK_04
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you are in need of assistance, please let me know... for I intend to aid you to the very end.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_UNIQUE_TALK_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hehe... That is quite impressive.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_UNIQUE_TALK_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}This adorable, round figure, this mischievous countenance that makes it impossible to discern his thoughts...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, and when paired with {f 0 1 35}Jack-o'-Lantern{f 0 1 27}, they put on quite a hysterical performance. Why, it may just knock you off your feet.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you haven't seen it yet, I highly recommend you do so.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_UNIQUE_TALK_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 4 -1 -1 0 0}Your {f 0 1 35}Jack Frost{f 0 1 27}... has reached level 99.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 4 -1 -1 0 0}I can't believe my eyes... To think you could even make this happen.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}You must have undergone incredible hardship to have him obtain such astounding power...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13212 202 0}Oh, how magnificent... Please, allow me to give you my sincerest praise.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}On top of his adorableness, he now has unparalleled strength.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}He has truly become an unstoppable force.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13218 202 0}...Weak to fire, you say? Well, that only makes him even more charming.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_UNIQUE_TALK_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}A being that was birthed only after forging a number of powerful bonds...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}I sense unfathomable strength and unrivaled potential dwelling within.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13230 202 0}I can hardly contain myself at the prospect of further growth...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_UNIQUE_TALK_05
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13215 202 0}I wonder. When will the wish I made at the fountain be granted?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 3 -1 -1 0 0}I have yet to receive any confirmation or even a progress report...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13227 202 0}...Perhaps I should have tossed in more coins.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}I suppose I'll double the amount to 2,000,000 yen next time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_UNIQUE_TALK_06
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13218 202 0}I thank you for allowing me to try so many delicacies the other day.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}They were all so very delectable, especially that takoyaki... It has become a new favorite of mine, one that can rival kinako.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13216 202 0}My interest in culinary delights has been piqued since then. However, my current position poses a bit of an obstacle.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}After much consideration, I have decided to increase the number of food-related requests.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13230 202 0}I am very much looking forward to seeing them fulfilled.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_UNIQUE_TALK_07
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13215 202 0}I attempted to negotiate terms for incorporating playground equipment in the Velvet Room...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13220 202 0}Unfortunately, my proposition was denied. How disappointing...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 2 -1 -1 0 0}If I cannot obtain permission, then all that remains is to exploit my master's absence.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13225 202 0}Victory shall be mine... Please await the good news.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_UNIQUE_TALK_08_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, yes... I've heard that this "high school" of yours holds festivals from time to time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13215 202 0}This particular "culture festival" seems to be a very exciting occasion.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13216 202 0}Moreover, I hear that it could trigger distortions in the space-time continuum, transporting you back to the "teenage years."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Unfortunately, I was unable to observe this phenomenon during my visit...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13218 202 0}But if the opportunity arises, I would very much like to partake in this festival with you one day.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_UNIQUE_TALK_09
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 3 -1 -1 0 0}About what happened in your room...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 4 -1 -1 1 0}A-Ahem... Pardon me, but the memory is still... ah, quite vivid.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 1 0}I'd greatly appreciate it if you could keep what happened a secret... Especially from my master.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_UNIQUE_TALK_10_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13215 202 0}Oh? Your aura seems very different from usual... Did something happen?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_UNIQUE_TALK_10_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Perhaps I am picking up the ocean's scent lingering on you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_UNIQUE_TALK_10_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13214 202 0}Oh, how disappointing. I don't mean to pry, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Did you have what they call a "once in a lifetime experience"? I hear they tend to occur during summertime.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_UNIQUE_TALK_10_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13218 202 0}Regardless, I'm glad you were able to enjoy yourself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_UNIQUE_TALK_11_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13216 202 0}I noticed that you were absent for some time. Did you take a trip somewhere?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Ah, a school trip... Where one embarks on a journey to better refine your body and soul.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13222 202 0}Then you must have overcome the final examination. You were once a student, but now you have become the master.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_UNIQUE_TALK_11_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}Regardless, all that matters is that it was a good experience for you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 4 -1 -1 0 0}...Hm? Is something the matter? You look rather morose.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_UNIQUE_TALK_12
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13212 202 0}Oh my... It looks as though you've forged a new bond, one that is far stronger and different from the others.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 3 -1 -1 0 0}And the bond you share will deepen even further, entwining their fate with yours...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 3 -1 -1 0 0}I must admit, I'm a little envious.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13208 202 0}Oh, my apologies. Please, hold on tightly to that bond... That very precious, very special bond.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_UNIQUE_TALK_13_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 3 -1 -1 0 0}Ever since that bout with you, it seems I've been getting lost in my own thoughts more often...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}But you needn't worry about it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13218 202 0}I believe... it is something that I will be able to overcome.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_UNIQUE_TALK_14_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}It seems you have a special strength that allows you to overcome any obstacle that stands in your way...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Though your story may end in tragedy...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}I can say, with confidence, you will persevere for the best possible outcome.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13204 202 0}...May the goddess of fortune smile upon you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_UNIQUE_TALK_14_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}I truly believe that there is no hardship you cannot conquer.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13204 202 0}...May the goddess of fortune smile upon you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_UNIQUE_TALK_15
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13222 202 0}Hm... It appears you have grown spectacularly.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}I believe you will now be able to wield a veritable plethora of Personas.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}But in regard to your potential, this is only the beginning of what you can achieve...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13230 202 0}Hone your Personas, and reach for even greater heights...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_UNIQUE_TALK_16
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13222 202 0}My... It appears you have undergone significant growth.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}One could say this is the culmination of your ability to attract others.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13218 202 0}Perhaps you may now be able to forge bonds with anyone with ease.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_UNIQUE_TALK_17
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13221 202 0}...And with that, all requests have been marked completed.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Which means you will not receive any more requests from me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13222 202 0}To think this day would come... It's quite moving, really.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}I know I may have had some rather unreasonable requests, but you've performed so splendidly.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13211 202 0}Allow me to give you my formal thanks.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_UNIQUE_TALK_18_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}May I take a look at that brooch you have there?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_ELIZ_UNIQUE_TALK_18_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I gave my {f 4 4 1 37 1 0} to Elizabeth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_UNIQUE_TALK_18_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}What intricate craftsmanship... And with platinum, no less![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}To tell you the truth, I absolutely adore things made of platinum...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13222 202 0}How exquisite... I had no idea such masterful creations are purchasable in your world.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_UNIQUE_TALK_18_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 1 0}Though this is not exactly a request, allow me to bestow upon you a reward nonetheless.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_UNIQUE_TALK_19_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13215 202 0}Oh my, what do you have there? It looks like a doll of sorts.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_ELIZ_UNIQUE_TALK_19_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I showed the {f 4 4 1 37 1 0} to Elizabeth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_UNIQUE_TALK_19_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13214 202 0}So... this is called the "Goggle-Eyed Idol"?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}It appears to be quite old... And I see the craftsman put a great amount of effort into the details.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 4 -1 -1 0 0}Come to think of it... does it not remind you of a certain Persona?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13224 202 0}Hm... Perhaps that's why it caught my attention in the first place.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Thank you for letting me study it. You may have this back now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_UNIQUE_TALK_20_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}For some inexplicable reason... I have a sudden urge to, as you humans say, "accessorize."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13218 202 0}Perhaps this is the perfect opportunity to don those items you have brought me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_UNIQUE_TALK_20_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Do you have any requests?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_UNIQUE_TALK_20_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 901 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13211 202 0}Why, thank you. I look quite stunning, if I do say so myself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 901 -1 0 0}Nothing raises the spirits more than adorning oneself with a little embellishment.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 901 -1 0 0}Ah, but I mustn't get too carried away and forget my duties. That's enough distraction for today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_UNIQUE_TALK_20_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 902 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13211 202 0}Why, mew-ci beaucoup— Ahem... I mean to say, thank you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 902 -1 0 0}Wearing these really does make you feel as if you are slowly transforming into a cat.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 902 -1 0 0}But that's enough of that for now. I wouldn't really want to become a cat, after all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_UNIQUE_TALK_20_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 903 -1 0 0}...My apologies. I'm still getting used to how itchy this mustache is, you see.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 903 -1 0 0}But that has certainly satisfied my urge, so that's enough dress-up for today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_UNIQUE_TALK_20_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 904 -1 0 0}Wearing this hat has put me in a rather festive mood. The impulse to pass out presents is strong...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 904 -1 0 0}Unfortunately, I have nothing to give at the moment. Perhaps another time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_UNIQUE_TALK_20_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 3 901 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13220 202 0}I don't deny that such urges do arise within me from time to time...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 3 901 -1 0 0}However, my duty is to serve my master. I do not wish to cause trouble for him.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 901 -1 0 0}Therefore... I believe that is enough distraction for today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_UNIQUE_TALK_20_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 3 902 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13220 202 0}Perhaps if my situation allowed it, I would have loved to do so.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 3 902 -1 0 0}Alas, wearing this enables me to metamorphose into a cat in both mind and body...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 902 -1 0 0}In order to fulfill my duties, I must refrain from wearing this on a regular basis...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_UNIQUE_TALK_20_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 2 903 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13220 202 0}I don't deny that such urges do arise within me from time to time...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 3 903 -1 0 0}However, wearing these causes my nose to itch quite a bit...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 903 -1 0 0}I fear it would interfere with my duties. I will have to save it for a special occasion.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_UNIQUE_TALK_20_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 904 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13220 202 0}Perhaps if my situation allowed it, I would have loved to do so.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 3 904 -1 0 0}However, wearing this makes it difficult for me to suppress the impulse of giving out presents...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 904 -1 0 0}But, in order to fulfill my duties, I will wear this whenever you desire.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SUBMIT_DRINK_QUERY_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Were you able to gather beverages sold in the vending machines?[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13231 202 0}I see... Of the different drinks available, you've managed to gather {f 2 4 0}. Would you be able to collect {f 2 4 1} more?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SUBMIT_DRINK_QUERY_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13202 202 0}It appears you've gathered all the different drinks. May I collect them from you now?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SUBMIT_DRINK_END_CAN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13204 202 0}I see. How disappointing. Perhaps some other time then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SUBMIT_DRINK_COMPLET
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13221 202 0}Oh my... There are this many!? It'd be such a waste to simply drink them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Perhaps tonight I will hold the ritual known as the "after-work drink" performed by laborers...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}In any case, the request is now completed. Please take this as your reward.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SUBMIT_ITEM_IMO_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13216 202 0}I sense an unusual power emanating from you. Do you perhaps have one of the potatoes you have grown?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SUBMIT_ITEM_IMO_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}What a truly bizarre potato... I can sense an unusual power radiating from it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13228 202 0}I imagine it would make a rather a-peeling meal.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 4 -1 -1 0 0}...Hm? Why are you giving me such a strange look?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13212 202 0}In any case, the request is now completed. Please take this as your reward.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SUBMIT_ITEM_IMO_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13204 202 0}I see. How disappointing. Perhaps some other time then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SUBMIT_DISH_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13202 202 0}Hm? It appears you have what I believe to be a "home-cooked meal"...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}What would you like to give me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SUBMIT_DISH_REPLY_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13221 202 0}Oh? I believe this is the first time I've ever had this, yet this flavor tastes rather... nostalgic.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}...I see. So this is what a "home-cooked meal" is.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SUBMIT_DISH_REPLY_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13208 202 0}Though simple and rustic in presentation, you can tell it was made with care.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}This thoughtfulness must be an important element in what makes a dish truly "home-cooked"...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SUBMIT_DISH_REPLY_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13218 202 0}The concept of "home" itself evokes a feeling of warmth and comfort—allegedly.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Though this coffee has a bitter taste, its warmth exudes a sort of comforting feeling as well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}In other words, something that's been "home-cooked" can be... soothing to the soul.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SUBMIT_DISH_REPLY_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13221 202 0}Ah, so this is what "home cooking" tastes like...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}An elegant, rich flavor. One with a luxurious mouthfeel.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SUBMIT_DISH_REPLY_5
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13222 202 0}Oh my! A presentation that showcases both the charm and appeal of the dish...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 4 -1 -1 0 0}An innovative combination of flavor profiles that deceives one's mind into savoring this taste for all eternity...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13212 202 0}Oh, how divine, absolutely divine! I never would have thought food could stir one's emotions...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SUBMIT_DISH_END
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}I believe I now understand why people crave the taste of home cooking...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13211 202 0}Thank you very much for sharing this culinary delight. Please take this as your reward.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SUBMIT_DISH_CANCEL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13204 202 0}I see. How disappointing. Perhaps some other time then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQ_HELP_030_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh? Is something the matter?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13214 202 0}Ah, I see... So there are people in your world who seek these materials.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}This {f 4 4 1 37 1 0} you seek can be found in the second block of Tartarus, Arqa.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}I've heard the {f 0 1 2}Lustful Snakes{f 0 1 27} that appear in the latter half of the block are quite fond of collecting them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13218 202 0}A material that captivates both Shadows and humans... How remarkably peculiar.[n]{f 1 1}
